company_basics.service_area: Raleigh-Durham metro and surrounding counties, 60-mile radius

primary_usp.headline: We reroofed over 400K sqft of commercial space in the Triangle last year without a single emergency callback.
primary_usp.supporting_detail: The company's core differentiator is execution reliability — projects finish on time, crews are pre-vetted, and every job ships with a documented punch list. Owners and facilities teams cite this as the reason they keep calling back.

additional_usps.headline: GAF Master Elite — top 2% of roofing contractors nationally
additional_usps.supporting_detail: GAF Master Elite status requires a rigorous vetting process and allows the company to offer the GAF Golden Pledge warranty — the strongest manufacturer-backed commercial roof warranty available.

additional_usps.headline: Drone-documented inspections with written reports delivered within 48 hours
additional_usps.supporting_detail: Every assessment includes drone footage and a written condition report. Owners get a real picture of their roof, not a verbal estimate over the phone.

additional_usps.headline: Zero disruption to tenants or operations during reroofing
additional_usps.supporting_detail: Commercial jobs are staged to avoid disrupting tenant operations. The company has reroofed active distribution centers, occupied office buildings, and live retail without a single documented tenant complaint.

signature_projects.outcome_summary: Full TPO reroof completed 3 days early, zero tenant disruption, no callbacks in 18 months
Emergency tear-off and reroof after hail damage; building reopened in 11 days, full insurance coordination handled by Torres
Phased reroof over 90 days to keep tenants operational; building owner extended a second property contract before job was finished

brand_voice.tone: direct, no-nonsense, blue-collar professional — confident but not arrogant, honest but not blunt to the point of being off-putting
phrases_to_avoid: I hope this email finds you well

customer_praise_themes.theme: shows up when they say they will — no chasing
customer_praise_themes.example_quote: Every other contractor we called was late or a no-show. Torres showed up at 7am on day one and every day after.

customer_praise_themes.theme: no surprise charges at the end
customer_praise_themes.example_quote: The quote we got was the price we paid. First time that's happened with a roofing contractor in 15 years.
They told us what actually needed to be done and what could wait. Didn't try to upsell us on a full replacement when repairs were the right call.

market_positioning.desired_reputation: the commercial roofing company that large landlords and property managers call first because they know the job will get done right without babysitting

signature_projects_summary: 400K+ sqft reroofed in the Triangle in 2025
185K sqft distribution center — zero disruption, finished early
78K sqft office reroof phased over 90 days with tenants in-place
top_review_themes: shows up when they say they will
volume_scale_claims: 50+ commercial roofs per year in the Triangle
